name: Chris Perry's Cold Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the thawed frozen tiny peas and chopped red onion.
2. Add the shredded cheddar cheese and bacon bits to the bowl.
3. Pour the ranch dressing over the mixture and stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving chilled.
